about.title: About LootScan
about.subtitle: A free game price comparison platform built for gamers.
about.feature1Desc: Constantly updated prices from Steam, GOG, Humble Store, Epic Games and 30+ more stores. Never miss a sale.
about.feature2Desc: Natural language search powered by Groq AI. Just type queries like "cyberpunk-like games" or "RPGs under $10".
about.feature3Desc: Save games you want to track. Get email notifications when they go on sale.
about.missionText: LootScan was built so gamers can easily find the best prices. Our goal is to make game shopping smarter through powerful search tools, real-time price tracking, and intelligent notifications.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Reach out with questions, suggestions, or feedback.
contact.emailDesc: For general inquiries and support requests.
contact.feedbackDesc: We love hearing feature suggestions and bug reports.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Content: LootScan collects only what is necessary to provide our service: your email address (for account creation and notifications) and wishlist contents. We do not collect sensitive personal information.
privacy.s2Content: Collected data is used to manage your account, send notifications when wishlist games go on sale, and improve service quality. We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.s3Content: We use CheapShark API for price data, Supabase for authentication and storage, Groq for AI search, and Resend for email notifications. Each has their own privacy policy.
privacy.s4Content: We use essential cookies for session management only. No advertising or tracking cookies are used.
privacy.s5Content: For privacy-related questions, email us at contact@lootscan.app.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Content: By using LootScan you agree to these terms. The service is intended for personal, non-commercial use only. Automated scraping, abuse of the platform, or illegal use is prohibited.
terms.s2Content: You are responsible for the security of your account. Keep your password confidential and notify us of any suspicious activity.
terms.s3Content: Price data is sourced from the CheapShark API. Prices may change at any time; verify with the relevant store before purchasing. LootScan is not liable for price discrepancies.
terms.s4Content: The LootScan platform and its content are copyright protected. Game images and trademarks belong to their respective owners.
terms.s5Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms without prior notice. We recommend checking this page periodically to stay up to date.

popular.title: Popular Games
popular.subtitle: We list this month's most popular games together, whether they are discounted or not. Add any game to your wishlist and get notified when it goes on sale.
popular.monthlyPicksDesc: This month's most popular games, with discounted and regular-priced titles shown together
popular.notifyAdded: You will be notified when it goes on sale
popular.notifyHint: Add it to your list and get sale alerts

browse.title: Browse Games
browse.subtitle: Search any game — on sale or not. Add it to your wishlist and we'll notify you when it goes on sale.
browse.placeholder: Type a game name... (e.g. God of War, Cyberpunk)
browse.emptyDesc: Type a game name above to see instant results.
browse.notifyHint: You'll be notified when it goes on sale
